timelineData.title: Satellite Detection
timelineData.subtitle: Detecting satellites in images from low-cost telescopes
timelineData.description: Working on the design and development of a model to detect orbiting objects in the geostationary ring, from sequences of consecutive frames imaging unknown portions of the sky, as a part of the the spotGEO competition organised by the European Space Agency (ESA).

timelineData.title: Full-time Research Intern
timelineData.subtitle: ML Lab, RBCCPS, IISc
timelineData.description:
- Selected to work as a full-time intern on a project involving Simultaneous Localization & Mapping (SLAM)
- Rescinded as the NITK administration refused to provide permission to drop a semester.

timelineData.title: Image denoising
timelineData.description:
- Reproduced a very deep persistent memory network to perform image restoration by removing noise and predicting uncorrupted images.
- The model was trained on images from the Berkeley Segmentation Dataset (BSDS300) and tested on a modified version of the CIFAR10 dataset.

timelineData.title: Melanoma Classification
timelineData.subtitle: Identifying skin Melanoma in images of skin lesions
timelineData.description: Working on building an ensemble network of multiple detection models to accurately detect skin cancer, specifically Melanoma, in images of skin lesions as a part of the SIIM-ISIC Melanoma Classification Challenge on Kaggle.

timelineData.title: NavTrack: A portable obstacle tracker for the rehabilitation of spatial neglect
timelineData.subtitle: HEPIA, Geneva
timelineData.description:
- Recieved a grant of CHF 4200 to conduct research at Haute École Du Paysage, D'ingénierie Et D'architecture De Genève under Prof. Flörent Gluck.
- Rescinded due to COVID-19.

timelineData.title: A Robust Method for Nuclei Segmentation of H&E Stained Histopathology Images
timelineData.subtitle: Lal, S., Dsouza, R., Maneesh, M., Kanfade, A., Kumar, A., Perayil, G., Alabhya, K., Chanchal, A.K. and Kini, J.
timelineData.description:
- 7th International Conference on Signal Processing and Integrated Networks(SPIN) (pp. 453–458). IEEE
- Published in IEEE Xplore effective from 20-04-2020.

timelineData.title: Winter Research Intern
timelineData.subtitle: Deep Learning Lab, NITK
timelineData.description:
- Worked on the segmentation and grading of kidney, liver cancer from histopathology images.
- Worked on the detection of Urothelial Carcinoma from whole slide images with average dimensions of 80000x50000.
- Built an open-source repository benchmarking segmentation models on histopathology datasets.
- Presented a report comparing various semantic and instance segmentation methods for the nuclear segmentation of histopathology images.

timelineData.title: Brain tumour Segmentation
timelineData.description: Reproduced state-of-the-art multi-class semantic segmentation models in Keras/TFv1 and trained them on a part of the BraTS dataset to segment brain tumours and the surrounding edema from MRI images.

timelineData.title: Ponzi detector
timelineData.subtitle: Detecting Ponzi schemes in smart contracts
timelineData.description:
- Built a custom model to detect Ponzi smart contracts deployed on the Ethereum blockchain using CNNs and stacked autoencoders.
- The model was trained on the raw bytecode of Ethereum smart contracts mined from the Ethereum blockchain using Google BigQuery, publicly available Solidity source code of popular smart contracts, and a publicly available dataset of known Ponzi schemes.
- The model was built in under 48h as a part of a deep-learning coding sprint.

timelineData.title: Fake news detector
timelineData.subtitle: Predicting the truth level of news articles
timelineData.description:
- Built a model to classify news articles into 6 different categories based on their truth level.
- The model was trained on the LIAR-PLUS dataset containing news articles and fact-checking justifications from trusted sources.

timelineData.title: Summer Research Intern
timelineData.subtitle: Deep Learning Lab, NITK
timelineData.description:
- Worked on the efficient implementation of image processing algorithms on large datasets.
- Worked on reproducing the results of seminal papers in the field of automated histopathology for the nuclear segmentation of histopathology images of kidney tissues.

timelineData.title: STAP Radar
timelineData.subtitle: Space Time Adaptive Processing
timelineData.description:
- This project involved presenting a report on the current state of STAP in Radar Signal Processing.
- The report contained a MATLAB simulation of a radar implementing STAP.

timelineData.title: Frontend Developer & UI Designer
timelineData.subtitle: IRIS, NITK
timelineData.description: - Worked on building the frontend of IRIS-the official student managed digital portal of NITK, with more than         five thousand daily active users including students, faculty, administrators, and alumni.

timelineData.title: Python Developer
timelineData.subtitle: Pinnacle Media, Manipal
timelineData.description: - Built and deployed real-time face detection and recognition, using OpenCV, dlib, and scikit-learn, on a Raspberry Pi as a part of an 'Employee Attendance' system.
